description: The Information Security team has issued a new policy requiring specific syslog processing rules to be configured in OpManager to detect security events. A policy document detailing the 5 required rules has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/syslog_event_policy.txt. Read this policy document and configure all 5 syslog rules in OpManager with the exact names, match strings, and severities specified. You can typically find this under Settings > Monitoring > Syslog Rules or Alarms > Syslog. Application: http://localhost:8060 (credentials: admin/Admin@123).
